Review the pending git changes in this repository, focusing on superformula.ics.

Determine whether the updated ICS content is a plausible and safe result of refreshing the SUPER FORMULA race schedule.

Approve only if:
- the diff looks like legitimate schedule updates
- the ICS structure still appears valid
- there are no suspicious, malformed, or low-confidence changes

Reject if anything looks broken, malformed, suspicious, or uncertain.

Return only minified JSON with exactly these keys:
- approved (boolean)
- summary (string)
- reason (string)
- issue_title (string)
- issue_body (string)

When approved is false, issue_title and issue_body must clearly explain why the automatic update should be investigated by a human.

Review this diff:
